inputs.label: Current Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Measured actual wall thickness from ultrasonic testing (UT) gauge.

inputs.label: Minimum Allowable Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Minimum thickness required by design code (e.g., ASME B31.3) before replacement.

inputs.label: Corrosion Rate (mm/year)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated uniform corrosion rate based on historical UT data or industry standards.

inputs.label: Measurement Confidence Factor
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor to account for UT measurement uncertainty (≥1.0).
